en_title: Treyarch Head Mark Gordon Steps Down from Call of Duty Studio
subtitle: 22年功勋告别
opus_summary: Treyarch负责人Gordon离职，由Yale Miller与Kevin Hendrickson接任，两年无新《使命召唤》，《黑色行动7》失利，前作或将重制。

paragraphs.en: Treyarch studio head Mark Gordon will be leaving the studio after 22 years.
paragraphs.cn: Treyarch工作室负责人Mark Gordon在任职22年后将离开工作室。

paragraphs.en: Treyarch announced the news on its socials , confirming that Gordon is leaving to begin the next chapter of his career, which has yet to be announced. Yale Miller and Kevin Hendrickson will take over as co-studio heads going forward. Miller and Hendrickson have been with Activision for years, with numerous respective credits on the Call of Duty franchise.
paragraphs.cn: Treyarch在社交媒体上宣布了这一消息，确认Gordon即将离开，开启职业生涯的新篇章，具体去向尚未公布。Yale Miller和Kevin Hendrickson将接任联合工作室负责人。两人在Activision工作多年，分别在《使命召唤》系列中积累了丰富的项目经历。

paragraphs.en: Gordon's departure comes just a few years after Treyarch's studio design director, David Vonderhaar — who was best known for overseeing the multiplayer modes in the Black Ops franchise — left to start his own studio .
paragraphs.cn: Gordon的离职距离Treyarch工作室设计总监David Vonderhaar——以负责《黑色行动》系列多人模式而闻名——离职创办自己的工作室不过短短数年。

paragraphs.en: Treyarch isn't expected to have a new Call of Duty game for another two years, so long as there aren't any major changes or disruptions to the Call of Duty development cycle. Infinity Ward will release Modern Warfare 4 later this year, and Sledgehammer Games is expected, though not confirmed, to release a new entry in the franchise next year.
paragraphs.cn: 只要《使命召唤》的开发周期未发生重大变化或中断，Treyarch预计还要两年才会推出一款新的《使命召唤》游戏。Infinity Ward将于今年晚些时候发布《现代战争4》，而Sledgehammer Games预计（但尚未确认）将在明年推出一款系列新作。

paragraphs.en: It's unclear if Treyarch is producing another Black Ops game. Although Black Ops 6 was a success, Black Ops 7 was considered a commercial disappointment and marked a fall from grace for the series. In the meantime, there are all kinds of rumors that suggest Activision and Treyarch are planning to re-release Black Ops 1 and 2 for modern hardware. Activision has yet to confirm anything, but fans found listings for the games in PlayStation's backend.
paragraphs.cn: 目前尚不清楚Treyarch是否在制作另一款《黑色行动》游戏。尽管《黑色行动6》取得了成功，但《黑色行动7》被认为商业表现令人失望，标志着该系列声誉下滑。与此同时，有各种传闻称Activision和Treyarch计划在现代平台重制《黑色行动1》和《黑色行动2》。Activision尚未确认任何消息，但粉丝们在PlayStation后台发现了这些游戏的列表。

paragraphs.en: Treyarch also recently updated Black Ops 7 with a new playlist known as Black Ops Classic . The playlist features old-school Black Ops maps and makes major changes to the gameplay to be more in line with the original Black Ops games. Some speculated it may be planting seeds for the re-releases.
paragraphs.cn: Treyarch最近还为《黑色行动7》更新了一个名为「Black Ops Classic」的新播放列表。该列表包含了经典的《黑色行动》地图，并对游戏玩法进行了重大调整，使其更贴近原版《黑色行动》游戏。有人猜测这可能是在为重制版铺路。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，负责报道游戏、影视等各类娱乐资讯。你可以在X上找到他 @Cade_Onder。
